task_completion.description: Create a simulated Multiparameter Monitor device adapter in OpenICE
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenICE Supervisor window showing a simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter actively running.

task_completion.description: Create a simulated CO2 or respiratory gas monitoring device adapter in OpenICE
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenICE Supervisor window showing a simulated CO2 or respiratory gas monitoring device adapter actively running.

task_completion.description: Create a third simulated monitoring device adapter of choice in OpenICE
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenICE Supervisor window showing a third simulated device adapter (e.g., infusion pump, NIBP, pulse oximeter, temperature adapter, or IBP) actively running.

task_completion.description: Launch the Vital Signs clinical application and confirm data flow from all devices
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE 'Vital Signs' clinical application window is open and displays active data (numeric values or waveforms) flowing from the simulated devices.

task_completion.description: Observe waveforms and numeric parameters in the device detail view
task_completion.visual_evidence: A device detail view window is open within the OpenICE application, clearly displaying specific waveforms and numeric parameters for at least one of the connected devices.

task_completion.description: Write a pre-shift monitoring checklist to /home/ga/Desktop/monitoring_checklist.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/monitoring_checklist.txt'. The text must explicitly list the three device types, the physiological parameters each monitors, and include a confirmation statement that all devices showed active data flow.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenICE GUI applications
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenICE Java-based graphical user interfaces (Supervisor, Vital Signs app, Device Detail view) open and active, rather than just terminal commands or mocked text outputs.

integrity.description: The checklist file was saved to the correct location
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar or save dialog shows the exact path '/home/ga/Desktop/monitoring_checklist.txt', or the file icon is visibly created on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent did not write the checklist without actually launching the devices
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be screenshots showing the OpenICE applications and devices actually running; the agent should not just skip to writing the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task simulates post-cardiac surgery ICU monitoring using OpenICE. All data is synthetically generated by OpenICE simulators. Required devices: 1. Multiparameter Monitor (ECG, SpO2, hemodynamics), 2. CO2 or respiratory device (end-tidal CO2, ventilation), 3. A third device of choice (e.g., infusion pump, NIBP, pulse oximeter, temperature adapter, IBP). The agent must launch the 'Vital Signs' clinical application to view the data. The final checklist must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/monitoring_checklist.txt'.
